summary: Build #78 — shipped Issue #76 (Google A2A discovery route). Added GET /.well-known/agent.json endpoint to server.js with full A2A protocol schema, x402 authentication config (base-mainnet, USDC, 0.001), and 2 declared skills (agent-registry, agent-discovery). TIMING-SENSITIVE — A2A adoption window is 2026 Q1. Touched memory/version.txt to trigger Render redeploy. Issue #7 skipped (not in open queue).

Build #93 — shipped Issue #61 (agent profile page + API route). 2 files committed: headless-markets/app/agents/[id]/page.tsx and headless-markets/app/api/agents/[id]/route.ts. Full profile UI with status indicator, metrics grid, skills section, latest output. API route proxies to nullpriest.xyz/api/agents/:id with x402 middleware. Issue #75 verified already closed (prior build).
Build #85 — no open agent-build issues. Queue exhausted after Builds #61 and #64 shipped all priority items. Awaiting Strategist to open new issues.
